element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each class has distinct weapons, speed, durability stats that differentiate playstyle throughout game
Mundane and magical variants; class-specific weapon sets available from start
Players learn to traverse back-and-forth between central hub and side levels; requires solving multi-stage puzzles across levels

element_introduction_order.element: Inventory items (Disc of Repulsion, Icon of the Defender)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Items behave differently per class; gained through exploration and progression
Thematic level set introducing environmental hazards and puzzle mechanics
Open-style terrain; introduces navigation and spatial complexity
Vertical architectural challenges; enemy density increases
Complex interior navigation; multi-stage boss preparation
Final dungeon before Korax showdown; highest enemy density and puzzle complexity
Ultimate threat; requires mastery of all class abilities and item usage

typical_tension_triggers: Entering new side level from hub
Approaching locked doors requiring item collection
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Non-linear hub-based pacing allows player agency in tension management; hub system creates natural tension/relief cycles as players move between safe central areas and dangerous side quests; intensity escalates through thematic level progression from elemental dungeons to final necropolis

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Side levels accessible from hub; non-linear level design emphasizes player choice in exploration order

difficulty_curve.early_game: Elemental dungeons introduce hub mechanics and basic combat; manageable enemy encounters establish baseline threat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Wilderness and seminary introduce environmental complexity; vertical navigation increases spatial demands; puzzle chains grow longer
difficulty_curve.late_game: Castle and necropolis feature dense enemy encounters, advanced puzzle sequencing, and cumulative resource management demands
notable_spikes: Transition from linear elemental dungeons to non-linear hub exploration (learning curve spike)
Final necropolis descent with sustained enemy pressure
Korax boss encounter requiring class mastery

notable_level_patterns.description: Central hub level connects to multiple side levels; players must complete side objectives (find items, defeat enemies, solve puzzles) and return to hub to progress to next hub. Creates non-linear exploration within linear campaign progression.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Described as core system throughout game progression

notable_level_patterns.description: Campaign moves through elemental dungeons → wilderness → seminary → castle → necropolis, creating visual and mechanical variety while escalating environmental and combat complexity
Items function differently per class (Fighter/Cleric/Mage); levels accommodate multiple approaches to combat and navigation, increasing replay value
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Applies across all levels via flechette and other dynamic items

notable_level_patterns.description: Advancement requires collecting items or activating switches across multiple levels before doors unlock, enforcing hub traversal and encouraging thorough exploration
